zh.lifeSummary: 當Elin Lindormsdotter於1507年出生在瑞典斯卡拉波格卡可法拉亞海托普時，她的父親Lindorm Brunsson47歲，母親Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik36歲。她於大約1530年與Mattias Nilsson Kagg在瑞典索德曼藍德福洛達結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1568年在瑞典額斯特格特藍德福利塔 可洛斯特享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elin Lindormsdotter于1507年出生在瑞典斯卡拉波格卡可法拉亞海托普时，她的父亲Lindorm Brunsson47岁，母亲Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik36岁。她于大约1530年与Mattias Nilsson Kagg在瑞典索德曼藍德福洛達结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1568年在瑞典額斯特格特藍德福利塔 可洛斯特享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Elen
meanings: form of Helen , now also used outside Wales. It is identical with the Welsh vocabulary word elen ‘nymph’, but this is unlikely to be the origin. It is found in Welsh texts from an early period as an equivalent of Helen, for example as the name of the mother of Constantine, finder of the True Cross.

historicEvents.title: The Stockholm Bloodbath
historicEvents.description: A mass execution of Swedish nobles by Danish king Christian II is known as the Stockholm Bloodbath. Christian II invaded Sweden in 1519 and took hold of Stockholm in September 1520. Over 80 nobles were executed for heresy on November 8 and 9. The outrage from the executions led to the Swedish removal of support of the Kalmar Union.

historicEvents.title: Swedish War of Liberation
historicEvents.description: The Swedish War of Liberation was a civil war led by nobleman Gustav Vasa. As Christian II heard of the rebellion, he confronted Vasa's men, who won the battle at Brunbacks Ferry. Christian II was defeated by the Swedes in Stockholm and a truce was agreed upon. Vasa was given as a hostage as a show of good faith until the treaty was signed. The Danish King did not keep his word and Vasa was held as a prisoner for two years until his escape. A bounty was placed on Vasa's head. Vasa worked to inspire many to join his cause and lived under disguise until the Danes surrendered in 1525.

historicEvents.title: Treaty of Malmo
historicEvents.description: The Treaty of Malmo was signed on September 1, 1524, which ended the Swedish War of Liberation and the independence of Sweden was recognized by Denmark and Norway.

historicEvents.title: First Full Swedish Translation of the New Testament
historicEvents.description: The first full Swedish translation of the New Testament was published in 1526.

historicEvents.title: First Full Swedish Translation of the Bible
historicEvents.description: The first full Swedish translation of the Bible, known as the Gustav Bible, was completed by Olaus Petri and Laurentius Andreae and published in 1540.

historicEvents.title: Sweden Becomes Lutheran Nation
historicEvents.description: Sweden officially declared itself a Lutheran nation in 1544.

en.lifeSummary: When Elin Lindormsdotter was born in 1507, in Häggetorp, Kyrkefalla, Skaraborg, Sweden, her father, Lindorm Brunsson, was 47 and her mother, Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik, was 36. She married Mattias Nilsson Kagg about 1530, in Floda, Södermanland, Sweden. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1568, in Vreta Kloster, Östergötland, Sweden, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elin Lindormsdotter est née en 1507, à Häggetorp, Kyrkefalla, Skaraborg, Suède, son père, Lindorm Brunsson, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Mattias Nilsson Kagg environ 1530, à Floda, Södermanland, Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1568, à Vreta Kloster, Östergötland, Suède, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elin Lindormsdotter 1507 in Häggetorp, Kyrkefalla, Skaraborg, Schweden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lindorm Brunsson 47 und ihre Mutter Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik 36. Sie hat um 1530 in Floda, Södermanland, Schweden Mattias Nilsson Kagg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1568 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Vreta Kloster, Östergötland, Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elin Lindormsdotter è nata il nel 1507 nel Häggetorp, Kyrkefalla, Skaraborg, Svezia, sua padre, Lindorm Brunsson, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Mattias Nilsson Kagg circa 1530, nel Floda, Södermanland, Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1568, nel Vreta Kloster, Östergötland, Svezia, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elin Lindormsdotterが1507年にスウェーデンスカラボルグクイルケファラhaグジェトルプで生まれた時，父Lindorm Brunssonは47歳，母Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvikは36歳であった。約1530年にスウェーデンスoデルマンランドフロダでMattias Nilsson Kaggと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1568年にスウェーデンoステルグoトランドvレタ クロスターで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elin Lindormsdotter(이)가 1507년 스웨덴 스카라볼그 키르케팰라 ha짓르프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lindorm Brunsson(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1530년 스웨덴 스o더먼랜드 플로다에서 Mattias Nilsson Kagg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1568년 스웨덴 o스터그o틀랜드 브레타 클로스터에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elin Lindormsdotter nasceu em 1507, em Häggetorp, Kyrkefalla, Skaraborg, Suécia, seu pai, Lindorm Brunsson, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Mattias Nilsson Kagg aproximadamente 1530, em Floda, Södermanland, Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1568, em Vreta Kloster, Östergötland, Suécia, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elin Lindormsdotter родилась в 1507 г. в местности хaгеторп, киркефалла, скараборг, Швеция, её отцу по имени Lindorm Brunsson было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Mattias Nilsson Kagg около 1530 г. в местности флода, сoдирманланд, Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1568 г. в местности врета клостир, oстиргoтланд, Швеция в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elin Lindormsdotter nació en 1507, en Häggetorp, Kyrkefalla, Skaraborg, Suecia, su papá, Lindorm Brunsson, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Carin Siggesdotter Sparre av Rossvik, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Mattias Nilsson Kagg aproximadamente 1530, en Floda, Södermanland, Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1568, en Vreta Kloster, Östergötland, Suecia, a la edad de 61 años.
